description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a rectangular base and a slightly angled upper section housing a display screen. The front panel features a control panel with two red joysticks and several buttons, as well as a coin slot and a large, colorful logo reading 'SUPER CLAIMS ADJUSTER.' The side panels are decorated with vibrant artwork, including an image of a person reading documents and the game's title in bold, retro-style lettering. The top of the cabinet has a marquee area with matching artwork and the game title, framed by a black border. The rear of the cabinet is plain black with ventilation grilles, typical of arcade machines. The cabinet is primarily constructed from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanism.
description: A retro upright arcade game cabinet with colorful side artwork, a control panel with joysticks and buttons, and a marquee displaying 'SUPER CLAIMS ADJUSTER.' The cabinet features a coin slot and bold, themed graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with two red joysticks, buttons, coin slot, and the 'SUPER CLAIMS ADJUSTER' logo on the lower panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large side artwork of a person reading documents and the game's title in bold letters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black surface with two ventilation grilles and no visible artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view, mirroring the left, with identical artwork and game title graphics.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and several round buttons arranged for single or two-player use, with a pink and orange color scheme and simple markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'SUPER CLAIMS ADJUSTER' title in bold, retro font on a pink and orange background, matching the side panel theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful artwork depicting a person reading documents, with the 'SUPER CLAIMS ADJUSTER' title in bold, stylized letters on a pink and orange gradient background.
